content:
ITEM 2. PROPERTIES
The following is a summary of principal properties owned or leased by NIKE:
The NIKE World Campus, owned by NIKE and located near [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], is an approximately 400-acre site consisting of over 40 buildings which, together with adjacent leased properties, functions as our world headquarters and is occupied by approximately 12,800 employees engaged in management, research, design, development, marketing, finance and other administrative functions serving nearly all of our segments. We lease a similar, but smaller, administrative facility in [LOCATION], the [LOCATION], which serves as the headquarters for our [LOCATION], [LOCATION] geography and management of certain brand functions for our [LOCATION] operations. We also lease an office complex in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], our headquarters for our [LOCATION] geography, occupied by employees focused on implementing our wholesale, NIKE Direct and merchandising strategies in the region, among other functions.
In [LOCATION], NIKE has seven significant distribution centers. Four are located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], two of which are owned and two of which are leased. Two other distribution centers, one located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and one located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], are leased and operated by third-party logistics providers. One distribution center for [PERSON] is located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], which is leased. NIKE has a number of distribution facilities outside [LOCATION], some of which are leased and operated by third-party logistics providers. The most significant distribution facilities outside [LOCATION] are located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION], [LOCATION], all of which we own, as well as in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], which is leased and operated by a third-party logistics provider.
Air Manufacturing Innovation manufactures cushioning components used in footwear at NIKE-owned and leased facilities located near [LOCATION], [LOCATION], and in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], as well as at NIKE-owned facilities in [LOCATION], [LOCATION].
Aside from the principal properties described above, we lease many offices worldwide for sales and administrative purposes. We lease 1,091 retail stores worldwide, which primarily consist of factory stores. See “United States Market” and “International Markets” for additional information regarding our retail stores. Our leases expire at various dates through [DATE_TIME].
ITEM 3.
